muniCodeNote: eCode360 returns 403 on direct WebFetch. Use city website pages and Google search snippets as fallback.
fireAgencyNote: RBFD is independent municipal fire dept. In-house fire plan check; runs in parallel with building review for commercial/large residential. Fees not published — contact RBFD.
wuiNote: No FHSZ or WUI designation. Dense urban coastal city.
coastalNote: Certified LCP. City issues own CDPs. Most parcels west of PCH. Applicants do not need CCC for standard development except appeals.
localCodeAmendments: Continuous footings required (no isolated piers without engineering)
Staples prohibited — nails required for roof sheathing and roof coverings
Roof dead load max 3 psf for stucco replacement assemblies
Soil: frictional resistance on silts/clays = 0.5× normal force
No wood retaining walls in SDC D, E, or F
wmpNote: Construction and Demolition Debris Management Plan required for all building permits effective May 1, 2025. 65% minimum diversion.
needsHumanReview: ADU Ordinance 3264-23 (Nov 2023) — exact local standards (size caps, setbacks) not confirmed from scrape; verify current RBMC Article vs. state minimums
Coastal Zone boundary — verify parcel-specific CDP requirement with Planning Dept
eCode360 WAF blocked — local amendment details sourced from search snippets; direct ordinance text not verified
